---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature or improvement
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem does this solve

<!-- Describe the problem from the user's perspective.
"As an LP I cannot see X, which means I have to Y manually every time."
Do not describe the solution yet — just the problem. -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- Describe what you want to build. Be specific about inputs,
outputs, and behavior. If this changes the CLI interface, show
the new command syntax. -->

## Alternatives you considered

<!-- What other approaches could solve this problem?
Why is your proposed solution better than the alternatives?
This is the most important section — it shows you thought it through. -->

## Academic basis

<!-- Does this feature have a published paper or formal specification
behind it? If yes, cite it. lvr-meter is a research-implementation
tool — features grounded in published work are prioritized.
If no academic basis exists, explain why the feature is still valid. -->

## Implementation notes

<!-- Optional. If you have thoughts on how to implement this —
which module it belongs in, what new types it needs, whether it
requires a new ADR — share them here. -->

## Does this require a new ADR

<!-- If implementing this feature requires an architectural decision
(new dependency, new data format, new algorithm choice), an ADR
will be needed before implementation begins. -->

- [ ] Yes — will need ADR for: ___
- [ ] No — fits within existing architectural decisions

## Scope

<!-- How large is this change? -->

- [ ] Small — one or two commits, single module
- [ ] Medium — one phase of the development plan
- [ ] Large — multiple phases, significant new subsystem
